Lesson_14_Info.keywords: Trigonometry, Gradio, SQLite, LDD 2.0, Agentic UX

terms.term: Log Driven Development version 2.0 with importance levels [IMP:1-10]
User experience designed for AI agents to interact with and understand

Lesson_14_Info.annotation: Project for calculating, storing, and visualizing trigonometric functions using a Gradio web interface and a CLI tool.

BusinessScenarios.Scenario: User enters trigonometric parameters in UI -> System calculates points -> Points saved to DB -> Graph rendered
User uses CLI to generate points based on config -> Points saved to DB
User uses CLI to export points from DB to CSV

ConfigManager_CLASS.NAME: ConfigManager
ConfigManager_CLASS.annotation: Manages application configuration and state via a JSON file.

load_config_METHOD.NAME: load_config
load_config_METHOD.annotation: Loads configuration from file or returns defaults.

save_config_METHOD.NAME: save_config
save_config_METHOD.annotation: Saves current or new configuration to file.

DatabaseManager_CLASS.NAME: DatabaseManager
DatabaseManager_CLASS.annotation: Manages data storage in SQLite for trigonometric points.

save_points_METHOD.NAME: save_points
save_points_METHOD.annotation: Saves a list of points to the database after clearing old data.

get_points_METHOD.NAME: get_points
get_points_METHOD.annotation: Retrieves all points from the database.

calculate_trig_points_FUNC.NAME: calculate_trig_points
calculate_trig_points_FUNC.annotation: Implements mathematical logic for calculating trigonometric points y = sin(x), cos(x), tan(x).

UIController_CLASS.NAME: UIController
UIController_CLASS.annotation: UI controller for managing Gradio logic and coordinating between logic and DB.

handle_generate_data_METHOD.NAME: handle_generate_data
handle_generate_data_METHOD.annotation: Handles "Generate Data" button click: saves config, calculates points, saves to DB.

handle_draw_graph_METHOD.NAME: handle_draw_graph
handle_draw_graph_METHOD.annotation: Handles "Draw Graph" button click: reads from DB and builds Plotly figure.

main_FUNC.NAME: main
main_FUNC.annotation: CLI entry point for generating points and exporting to CSV.

main_FUNC.NAME: main
main_FUNC.annotation: Main entry point for the Gradio application.
